text: For the drainage field test package we recommend Subcontractor GI-2 (illustrative) (F-GI-02) at HK$1,114,790. We recommend against Subcontractor GI-1 (illustrative) (F-GI-01) despite its bid being the lowest on the sheet at HK$1,020,590: the public record carries two safety-prosecution convictions at the Labour Department, a fatal flag that disqualifies it regardless of price. The bid leveling reaches the same conclusion on price alone, since GI-1 excluded the water supply (G14) and did not price the freeboard (G16); valued at the peer rate its like-for-like total is HK$1,127,890, above the recommended bid. Subcontractor GI-3 (illustrative) (F-GI-03) corrected upward from HK$1,067,150 to HK$1,133,150 once an understated line (G13) was recomputed. The illustrative cautionary firm is fictional and a person approves the award.
